channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump to Attend World Cup Final on Sunday
item.description: President Donald Trump will attend the World Cup final between Argentina and Spain at the New York-New Jersey stadium on Sunday, White House press secretary announced.

item.title: Fetterman Not Drawing Red Lines Over Democrat Anti-Israel Rhetoric yet, but His Red Pencil May Be in Hand
She's Back! Karoline Leavitt Torches CNN Anchor's Shameless Gotcha Ahead of Trump's Address to Nation
Sen Eric Schmitt seeks to end birth tourism, revoke citizenship for babies of foreign diplomats
item.description: Sen. Eric Schmitt demands the State Department and DHS revoke citizenship documentation issued to children born to foreign diplomats in the U.S.
